StateMachine.name: RosSerializationCppToPy
StateMachine.description: Serializes a C++ ROS interface object into bytes and reconstructs it as a native Python ROS interface object.

Param.name: interface_type
Param.description: Concrete ROS interface type passed to both conversion states.

Key.name: input
Key.description: C++ ROS interface instance that should be serialized.

Key.name: bytes
Key.description: Serialized byte buffer shared between both conversion states.

Key.name: output
Key.description: Final Python ROS interface instance reconstructed from the byte buffer.

FinalOutcome.name: done
FinalOutcome.description: The interface was serialized in C++ and deserialized in Python.

FinalOutcome.name: type_error
FinalOutcome.description: The configured interface type did not match the runtime blackboard data.
